headlines.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
headlines.description: Here's the latest news and reactions from our NBA insiders, including how the Bulls are thinking about their front office vacancies.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: Knicks losing to the Hawks would be an 'epic failure'
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith previews the Knicks' playoff series against the Hawks and what could happen if New York gets knocked out.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: Lakers beating the Rockets is pretty close to impossible
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith shares why he believes the Rockets will handle the Lakers in four or five games.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: The Spurs aren't afraid of anybody this postseason
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith discusses why he didn't have an issue with the Spurs resting Victor Wembanyama for the final game of the NBA regular season.

headlines.headline: Is KAT the key to a deep postseason run by the Knicks?
headlines.description: Vincent Goodwill says Karl-Anthony Towns having a dominant postseason could carry New York all the way to the NBA Finals.

headlines.headline: What's next for Giannis and the Bucks?
headlines.description: Vincent Goodwill breaks down potential landing spots for Giannis Antetokounmpo if he departs the Bucks this offseason.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Cincinnati Bengals updates, intel, buzz
headlines.description: The Bengals are set to pick No. 10 and have eight total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Cincy might do.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Indianapolis Colts updates, intel, buzz
headlines.description: The Colts are set to pick No. 47 and have seven total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Indy might do.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Las Vegas Raiders updates, intel, buzz
headlines.description: The Raiders are set to pick No. 1 and have 10 total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on Las Vegas.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Chicago Bears updates, intel, buzz
headlines.description: The Bears are set to pick No. 25 and have seven total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Chicago might do.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest New England Patriots updates, intel, buzz
headlines.description: The Patriots pick late in Round 1 and have 11 total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what New England might do.

headlines.headline: What are the Cowboys looking for in the first round?
headlines.description: Dan Graziano and Domonique Foxworth discuss the Cowboys' strategy in this year's NFL draft.

headlines.headline: NHL Awards Watch: Who's leading for Hart, Norris, Calder?
headlines.description: Our panel of PHWA voters identify their finalists for all the awards, with some tight finishes in a few spots.

headlines.headline: Why the Ted Lindsay Award should be the NHL's MVP of record
headlines.description: Both the Lindsay and the Hart trophy winners can be considered the league's best player. But the latter currently has a lot more prestige.

headlines.headline: NHL playoff watch: What's at stake in each Monday matchup
headlines.description: There isn't much season left to determine playoff seeding and draft lottery order. Here's a rundown of what's on tap.

headlines.headline: Washington brings 3-game win streak into matchup with Columbus
headlines.description: Washington Capitals (42-30-9, in the Metropolitan Division) vs. Columbus Blue Jackets (40-29-12, in the Metropolitan Division)

headlines.headline: Devils play the Bruins after Hischier's 2-goal game
headlines.description: New Jersey Devils (42-36-3, in the Metropolitan Division) vs. Boston Bruins (44-27-10, in the Atlantic Division)

headlines.headline: Brayden Pachal has 3 points as the Flames beat the Mammoth 4-1
headlines.description: — Brayden Pachal scored his first NHL goal of the season and added two assists on Sunday night as the Calgary Flames’ hot streak at home continued with a 4-1 victory over the Utah Mammoth.

satire_angles.description: The New England Patriots got absolutely destroyed
satire_angles.game: Seattle Seahawks at New England Patriots
